creator: gehm@sudoers.net
text:
/usr/ports/x11-wm/compiz-fusion-plugins-extra won't build because the necessary src-file is not available for weeks now.

Fix: 

I found one side with this file included. Maybe it would be helpful to put it on ftp.freebsd.org. Here is the link:

rsync://distro.ibiblio.org/gentoo/distfiles/compiz-fusion-plugins-extra-0.6.0.tar.bz2
How-To-Repeat: just try to build it
